Our Story

More than just
a bookshop

Ink & Chai was born from a simple belief — that the right book, paired with a warm cup of chai, can change everything. We curate every title with care for readers who love to get lost in words.

From Indian literary masters to manga, from self-help to rare finds — our catalogue spans 40+ genres with fast pan-India delivery straight to your door.

Our Story
Delivery

Check delivery
to your pincode

We deliver pan-India via trusted courier partners.

Stay in the loop

New arrivals. Rare finds.
Every week.

Join readers who get our weekly picks — new arrivals, deals, and chai-approved reads. No spam, ever.
